name: Tekfen Holding Anonim Sirketi
summary: Tekfen Holding Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in contracting, agriculture, investment, and services businesses in Turkey and internationally. It specializes in the construction of petroleum, gas and petrochemical facilities, pipelines, land and sea terminals, tank farms, oil refineries, off-shore platforms, pumping and compressor stations, power plants, industrial facilities, highways, metro and railroad projects, sports complexes, infrastructure, and other civil engineering projects. The company is also involved in engineering, manufacturing, management, and agriculture-shipping agency services. In addition, it offers fertilizers, and seeds. Further, the company engages in the production of seedlings and saplings; and marine terminal services, and free zone and fuel station management. Additionally, it engages in the insurance brokerage and studio management businesses. Tekfen Holding Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1956 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
